app.rdg: Stab tihîlh Lebatem?
stab tiʔiɬ Lebatem.
What is baptism?
Tihîlh Lebatem dcho Sakrema o hoyud whe al debalh ku tskwadad tolal Adam eku boku tskwadad;
tiʔiɬ Lebatem dəč'uʔ Sakrema ʔuhuyud xʷiʔ ʔal dibəɬ kʷi ʤəkʼʷadad tulʼʔal Adam ʔi kʷi bəkʷ dᶻəkʼʷadad;
Baptism is a sacrament that makes null for you the sin from Adam and all sin.
al tihîlh Lebatem ku sasralchelh a ta gwalh Sherk-Siam eta gwalh leglis bedebeda sral;
ʔal tiʔiɬ Lebatem kʷi səsx̌alčəɬ ʔə tə gʷəl šəq siʔab ʔi tə gʷəɬ ləglis bədbədaʔ sx̌al;
With baptism we mark ourselves as being of God and children of the Church.
tsidîlh Lebatem o hoyutobolh kretia.
cədiɬ ləbatəm ʔuhuyutubuɬ kretia.
Baptism makes us Christians.
2. Asared kwi stsagwaleku?
2. ʔəsʔəx̌id kʷi scʼagʷalikʷ?
2. How is the washing?
Abil leple otsagwaleku gula kwelhed ku kro aku tlewalh dhual ku sreyus,
ʔabilʼ leple ʔucʼagʷalikʷ gʷəl kʼʷəɬəd kʷi qʷuʔ ʔə kʷi tləwaɬ dxʷʔal kʷi sx̌əyʼus,
When the priest baptizes he pours the water from the ?? onto the head
gwagwadad askro aku astsut;
gʷəgʷadad ʔəsqʼʷuʔ ʔə kʷi ʔəscut;
talking along with the saying;
tsa otsagwatsid dgwe, dhual ksda aku Bad, eta Bedas, eta Sent-Ospli.
ʔəca ʔucʼagʷacid dəgʷi, dxʷʔal kʷi sdaʔ ʔə kʷi bad, ʔi tə bədaʔs, i tə Sent-Ospli.
I baptize you in the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit.
3. Abil gwat asra'tleldhu kwi gwas stsakus, gula asared kwi gwas krwebitsuts dhual stsaku?
3. ʔəbilʼ gʷat ʔəsx̌aƛ'ildxʷ kʷi gʷəscʼaʔkʷs, gʷəl ʔəsʔəx̌id kʷi gwəsqʷibicuc dxʷʔal cʼaʔkʷ.
3. If someone wants baptism, then how do they prepare for baptism?
Abil gwat asra'tleldhu kwi gwas stsakus, gula tlo haidhu,
ʔəbilʼ gʷat ʔəsx̌aƛ'ildxʷ kʷi gʷəscʼaʔkʷs, gʷəl ɬuhaydxʷ,
If someone wants baptism, then they will find out,
gula tlo tleldhu gwalh Sherk-Siam sgwadgwad,
gʷəl ɬutɬildxʷ gʷəɬ šəq siʔab sgʷadgʷad,
they will believe in God's sayings,
gula tlo rahab dhual ku sgwas tskwadads,
gʷəl ɬǔx̌ahəb dxʷʔal kʷi sgʷaʔs dᶻəkʼʷadads,
they will mourn for their own sins,
gula tlo whobed aku tsoku ku boku sa;
gʷəl ɬuxʷəbəd ʔə kʷi cukʷ kʷi bəkʷ saʔ;
they will discard all evil for ever;
gula tlo tibitsut dhual kwi tlo tskwakred tlhdahu halhs.
gʷəl ɬutibicut dxʷʔal kʷi ɬuckʼʷaqid tɬdəxʷ haʔɬs.
then they will try hard to always believe in good.
4. Abil o gwat otsaku, gula tlo whobed o ku lejob, eku gwalh lejob alalus?
4. ʔəbilʼ ʔu gʷat ʔucʼakʷ, gʷəl ɬuxʷəbəd ʔu kʷi lejob, ʔi kʷi gʷəɬ lejob ʔalalus?
4. If someone is baptized, will the devil discard them, and the happenings (?) of the devil?
E, abil gwat otsaku, gula tlo whobed ku lejob, eku gwalh lejob alalus.
ʔə, ʔəbilʼ gʷat ʔucʼakʷ, gʷəl ɬuxʷəbəd kʷi lejob, ʔi kʷi gʷəɬ lejob ʔalalus.
Yes, if someone is baptized, the devil will discard them, and the happenings (?) of the devil.
5. Astsut o kwi rech a kwi Sherk-Siam, dhual ku astsaku atsilhtalbihu
5. ʔ̌əscut ʔu kʷi x̌əč ʔə kʷi šəq siʔab, dxʷʔal kʷi ʔəscʼaʔkʷ ʔaciɬtalbixʷ
gwas chalads halgwa gwalh Shesu-Kri rech eku gwalh Shesu-Kri alalus?
gʷəsčalads həlgʷəʔ gʷəɬ Shesu-Kri x̌əč ʔi kʷi gʷəɬ Shesu-Kri ʔalalus.
E, astsut kwi rech a kwi Sherk-Siam, dhual ku astsaku atsilhtalbihu
ʔi, ʔəscut kʷi x̌əč ʔə kʷi šəq siʔab, dxʷʔal kʷi ʔəscʼaʔkʷ ʔaciɬtalbixʷ
gwas chalads halgwa gwalh Shesu-Kri rech, eku gwalh Shesu-Kri alalus,
gʷəsčalads halgwa gʷəɬ Shesu-Kri x̌əč, ʔi kʷi gʷəɬ Shesu-Kri ʔalalus,
yare tu hoi kretia.
yəx̌i tuhuy kretia.
but made a Christian.
6. Kraalh o ku sp'tleltsob aku kretia?
6. croixaɬ ʔu kʷi sp̕əƛ'ilcəb ʔə kʷi kretia.
6. Does a Christian cross his torso?
E, kraal ku sp'tleltsob aku kretia,
ʔi, ?aal kʷi sp̕əƛ'ilcəb ʔə kʷi kretia ,
Yes, a Christian does cross his torso
yare tihîlh sp'tleltsob aku kretia dahu aslardubs ku Sen-Trinite,
yəx̌i tiʔiɬ sp̕əƛ'ilcəb ʔə kʷi kretia dəxʷəslax̌dubs kʷi Sen-Trinite,
but the feeling of the Christian is the way they remember the Holy Trinity,
eku gwalh Shesu-Kri tus skrpotobolhs al lekwe.
ʔi kʷi gʷəɬ Shesu-Kri tusqəputubuɬs ʔal lekwe.
and Jesus Christ's atonement for us on the cross,
